parameters.content:
## Job Management & Cleanup

Automatically cleans up old transcription jobs on a schedule.
Runs every hour, finds completed and failed jobs older than 24 hours,
and deletes them to free up server resources.

**API Features Used:**
- `GET /api/v1/jobs?status=completed` — list completed jobs
- `GET /api/v1/jobs?status=failed` — list failed jobs
- `DELETE /api/v1/jobs/{id}` — delete a job and its files

**Job statuses:** queued, processing, completed, failed

**Cleanup policy:**
- Completed jobs older than 24 hours — deleted
- Failed jobs older than 24 hours — deleted
- Queued/processing jobs — never touched

**Setup:** Set `TRANSCRIPTION_API_URL` env var or use default.

## Job Management API

**List jobs by status:**
```
GET /api/v1/jobs?status=completed
GET /api/v1/jobs?status=failed
GET /api/v1/jobs?status=queued
GET /api/v1/jobs?status=processing
```

**Delete a job:**
```
DELETE /api/v1/jobs/{job_id}
```
Removes the job record and all associated files.

**Job object fields:**
- `job_id` — unique identifier
- `status` — queued/processing/completed/failed
- `created_at` — ISO timestamp
- `completed_at` — ISO timestamp (if done)
- `filename` — original upload name
- `output_files` — list of result files

string.name: result
string.value: No old jobs to clean up

meta.description: Scheduled job cleanup workflow. Every hour, lists completed and failed transcription jobs, identifies those older than 24 hours, and deletes them to free server resources.
